   183	      end
   184	    end
   185	  end
   186	end

1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Api
     5	    class CheckoutsController < Spree::Api::BaseController
     6	      before_action :load_order, only: [:next, :advance, :update, :complete]
     7	      around_action :lock_order, only: [:next, :advance, :update, :complete]
     8	      before_action :update_order_state, only: [:next, :advance, :update, :complete]
     9	
    10	      rescue_from Spree::Order::InsufficientStock, with: :insufficient_stock_error
    11	
    12	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::PaymentParameters
    13	
    14	      include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::Order
    15	
    16	      def next
    17	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    18	        if !expected_total_ok?(params[:expected_total])
    19	          respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/expected_total_mismatch", status: 400)
    20	          return
    21	        end
    22	        @order.next!
    23	        respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show", status: 200)
    24	      end
    25	
    26	      def advance
    27	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    28	        @order.contents.advance
    29	        respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show", status: 200)
    30	      end
    31	
    32	      def complete
    33	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    34	        if !expected_total_ok?(params[:expected_total])
    35	          respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/expected_total_mismatch", status: 400)
    36	        else
    37	          @order.complete!
    38	          respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show", status: 200)
    39	        end
    40	      end
    41	
    42	      def update
    43	        authorize! :update, @order, order_token
    44	
    45	        if Spree::Config.order_update_attributes_class.new(@order, update_params, request_env: request.headers.env).call
    46	          if can?(:admin, @order) && user_id.present?
    47	            @order.associate_user!(Spree.user_class.find(user_id))
    48	          end
    49	
    50	          return if after_update_attributes
    51	
    52	          if @order.completed? || @order.next!
    53	            state_callback(:after)
    54	            respond_with(@order, default_template: "spree/api/orders/show")
    55	          end
    56	        else
    57	          invalid_resource!(@order)
    58	        end
    59	      end
    60	
    61	      private
    62	
    63	      def user_id
    64	        params[:order][:user_id] if params[:order]
    65	      end
    66	
    67	      def update_params
    68	        state = @order.state
    69	        case state.to_sym
    70	        when :cart, :address
    71	          massaged_params.fetch(:order, {}).permit(
    72	            permitted_checkout_address_attributes
    73	          )
    74	        when :delivery
    75	          massaged_params.require(:order).permit(
    76	            permitted_checkout_delivery_attributes
    77	          )
    78	        when :payment
    79	          massaged_params.require(:order).permit(
    80	            permitted_checkout_payment_attributes
    81	          )
    82	        else
    83	          massaged_params.fetch(:order, {}).permit(
    84	            permitted_checkout_confirm_attributes
    85	          )
    86	        end
    87	      end
    88	
    89	      def massaged_params
    90	        massaged_params = params.deep_dup
    91	
    92	        set_payment_parameters_amount(massaged_params, @order)
    93	
    94	        massaged_params
    95	      end
    96	
    97	      # Should be overridden if you have areas of your checkout that don't match
    98	      # up to a step within checkout_steps, such as a registration step
    99	      def skip_state_validation?
   100	        false
   101	      end
   102	
   103	      def load_order
   104	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:id])
   105	      end
   106	
   107	      def update_order_state
   108	        @order.state = params[:state] if params[:state]
   109	        state_callback(:before)
   110	      end
   111	
   112	      def state_callback(before_or_after = :before)
   113	        method_name = :"#{before_or_after}_#{@order.state}"
   114	        send(method_name) if respond_to?(method_name, true)
   115	      end
   116	
   117	      def after_update_attributes
   118	        false
   119	      end
   120	
   121	      def order_id
   122	        super || params[:id]
   123	      end
   124	
   125	      def expected_total_ok?(expected_total)
   126	        return true if expected_total.blank?
   127	        @order.total == BigDecimal(expected_total)
   128	      end
   129	    end
   130	  end
   131	end

     9	      def new

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Api
     5	    class ShipmentsController < Spree::Api::BaseController
     6	      before_action :find_order_on_create, only: :create
     7	      before_action :find_shipment, only: [:update, :ship, :ready, :add, :remove, :estimated_rates, :select_shipping_method]
     8	      before_action :load_transfer_params, only: [:transfer_to_location, :transfer_to_shipment]
     9	      around_action :lock_order, except: [:mine, :estimated_rates]
    10	      before_action :update_shipment, only: [:ship, :ready, :add, :remove]
    11	
    12	      def mine
    13	        if current_api_user
    14	          @shipments = Spree::Shipment
    15	            .reverse_chronological
    16	            .joins(:order)
    17	            .where(spree_orders: {user_id: current_api_user.id})
    18	            .includes(mine_includes)
    19	            .ransack(params[:q]).result
    20	
    21	          @shipments = paginate(@shipments)
    22	        else
    23	          render "spree/api/errors/unauthorized", status: :unauthorized
    24	        end
    25	      end
    26	
    27	      def estimated_rates
    28	        authorize! :update, @shipment
    29	        estimator = Spree::Config.stock.estimator_class.new
    30	        @shipping_rates = estimator.shipping_rates(@shipment.to_package, false)
    31	      end
    32	
    33	      def select_shipping_method
    34	        authorize! :update, @shipment
    35	        shipping_method = Spree::ShippingMethod.find(params.require(:shipping_method_id))
    36	        @shipment.select_shipping_method(shipping_method)
    37	        @order.recalculate
    38	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    39	      end
    40	
    41	      def create
    42	        authorize! :create, Shipment
    43	        @shipment = @order.shipments.create(stock_location_id: params.fetch(:stock_location_id))
    44	
    45	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    46	      end
    47	
    48	      def update
    49	        @shipment.update_attributes_and_order(shipment_params)
    50	
    51	        respond_with(@shipment.reload, default_template: :show)
    52	      end
    53	
    54	      def ready
    55	        unless @shipment.ready?
    56	          if @shipment.can_ready?
    57	            @shipment.ready!
    58	          else
    59	            logger.error("cannot_ready_shipment shipment_state=#{@shipment.state}")
    60	            render("spree/api/shipments/cannot_ready_shipment", status: 422) && return
    61	          end
    62	        end
    63	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    64	      end
    65	
    66	      def ship
    67	        authorize! :ship, @shipment
    68	        unless @shipment.shipped?
    69	          @shipment.suppress_mailer = (params[:send_mailer] == "false")
    70	          @shipment.ship!
    71	        end
    72	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    73	      end
    74	
    75	      def add
    76	        quantity = params[:quantity].to_i
    77	
    78	        @shipment.order.contents.add(variant, quantity, {shipment: @shipment})
    79	        respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    80	      end
    81	
    82	      def remove
    83	        quantity = params[:quantity].to_i
    84	
    85	        if @shipment.shipped? || @shipment.canceled?
    86	          @shipment.errors.add(:base, :cannot_remove_items_shipment_state, state: @shipment.state)
    87	          invalid_resource!(@shipment)
    88	        else
    89	          @shipment.order.contents.remove(variant, quantity, {shipment: @shipment})
    90	          @shipment.reload if @shipment.persisted?
    91	          respond_with(@shipment, default_template: :show)
    92	        end
    93	      end
    94	
    95	      def transfer_to_location
    96	        @desired_stock_location = Spree::StockLocation.find(params[:stock_location_id])
    97	        @desired_shipment = @original_shipment.order.shipments.build(stock_location: @desired_stock_location)
    98	        transfer_to_shipment
    99	      end
   100	
   101	      def transfer_to_shipment
   102	        @desired_shipment ||= Spree::Shipment.find_by!(number: params[:target_shipment_number])
   103	
   104	        fulfilment_changer = Spree::FulfilmentChanger.new(
   105	          current_shipment: @original_shipment,
   106	          desired_shipment: @desired_shipment,
   107	          variant: @variant,
   108	          quantity: @quantity,
   109	          track_inventory: Spree::Config.track_inventory_levels
   110	        )
   111	
   112	        if fulfilment_changer.run!
   113	          render json: {success: true, message: t("spree.api.shipment.transfer_success")}, status: :accepted
   114	        else
   115	          render json: {success: false, message: fulfilment_changer.errors.full_messages.to_sentence}, status: :accepted
   116	        end
   117	      end
   118	
   119	      private
   120	
   121	      def load_transfer_params
   122	        @original_shipment = Spree::Shipment.find_by!(number: params[:original_shipment_number])
   123	        @order = @original_shipment.order
   124	        @variant = Spree::Variant.find(params[:variant_id])
   125	        @quantity = params[:quantity].to_i
   126	        authorize! [:update, :destroy], @original_shipment
   127	        authorize! :create, Shipment
   128	      end
   129	
   130	      def find_order_on_create
   131	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:shipment][:order_id])
   132	        authorize! :show, @order
   133	      end
   134	
   135	      def find_shipment
   136	        if @order.present?
   137	          @shipment = @order.shipments.find_by!(number: params[:id])
   138	        else
   139	          @shipment = Spree::Shipment.readonly(false).find_by!(number: params[:id])
   140	          @order = @shipment.order
   141	        end
   142	        authorize! :update, @shipment
   143	      end
   144	
   145	      def update_shipment
   146	        @shipment.update(shipment_params)
   147	        @shipment.reload
   148	      end
   149	
   150	      def shipment_params
   151	        if params[:shipment] && !params[:shipment].empty?
   152	          params.require(:shipment).permit(permitted_shipment_attributes)
   153	        else
   154	          {}
   155	        end
   156	      end
   157	
   158	      def variant
   159	        @variant ||= Spree::Variant.unscoped.find(params.fetch(:variant_id))
   160	      end
   161	
   162	      def mine_includes
   163	        {
   164	          order: {
   165	            bill_address: {
   166	              state: {},
   167	              country: {}
   168	            },
   169	            ship_address: {
   170	              state: {},
   171	              country: {}
   172	            },
   173	            adjustments: {},
   174	            payments: {
   175	              order: {},
   176	              payment_method: {}
   177	            }
   178	          },
   179	          inventory_units: {
   180	            line_item: {
   181	              product: {},
   182	              variant: {}
   183	            },
   184	            variant: {
   185	              product: {},
   186	              prices: {},
   187	              option_values: {
   188	                option_type: {}
   189	              }
   190	            }
   191	          }
   192	        }
   193	      end
   194	    end
   195	  end
   196	end

1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class OrdersController < Spree::Admin::BaseController
     6	      before_action :initialize_order_events
     7	      before_action :load_order, only: [:edit, :complete, :advance, :cancel, :resume, :approve, :resend, :unfinalize_adjustments, :finalize_adjustments, :cart, :confirm]
     8	      around_action :lock_order, only: [:advance, :complete, :confirm, :cancel, :resume, :approve, :resend]
     9	
    10	      rescue_from Spree::Order::InsufficientStock, with: :insufficient_stock_error
    11	      respond_to :html
    12	
    13	      def show
    14	        redirect_to action: :edit
    15	      end
    16	
    17	      def index
    18	        params[:q] ||= {}
    19	        params[:q][:completed_at_not_null] ||= "1" if Spree::Config[:show_only_complete_orders_by_default]
    20	        @show_only_completed = params[:q][:completed_at_not_null] == "1"
    21	        params[:q][:s] ||= @show_only_completed ? "completed_at desc" : "created_at desc"
    22	        params[:q][:completed_at_not_null] = "" unless @show_only_completed
    23	
    24	        # As date params are deleted if @show_only_completed, store
    25	        # the original date so we can restore them into the params
    26	        # after the search
    27	        created_at_gt = params[:q][:created_at_gt]
    28	        created_at_lt = params[:q][:created_at_lt]
    29	
    30	        params[:q].delete(:inventory_units_shipment_id_null) if params[:q][:inventory_units_shipment_id_null] == "0"
    31	
    32	        if params[:q][:created_at_gt].present?
    33	          params[:q][:created_at_gt] = begin
    34	            Time.zone.parse(params[:q][:created_at_gt]).beginning_of_day
    35	          rescue
    36	            ""
    37	          end
    38	        end
    39	
    40	        if params[:q][:created_at_lt].present?
    41	          params[:q][:created_at_lt] = begin
    42	            Time.zone.parse(params[:q][:created_at_lt]).end_of_day
    43	          rescue
    44	            ""
    45	          end
    46	        end
    47	
    48	        if @show_only_completed
    49	          params[:q][:completed_at_gt] = params[:q].delete(:created_at_gt)
    50	          params[:q][:completed_at_lt] = params[:q].delete(:created_at_lt)
    51	        end
    52	
    53	        @search = Spree::Order.accessible_by(current_ability, :index).ransack(params[:q])
    54	        @orders = @search.result.includes([:user])
    55	          .page(params[:page])
    56	          .per(params[:per_page] || Spree::Config[:orders_per_page])
    57	
    58	        # Restore dates
    59	        params[:q][:created_at_gt] = created_at_gt
    60	        params[:q][:created_at_lt] = created_at_lt
    61	      end
    62	
    63	      def new
    64	        user = Spree.user_class.find_by(id: params[:user_id]) if params[:user_id]
    65	        order_importer_params = order_params
    66	        order_importer_params[:bill_address] = user&.bill_address
    67	        order_importer_params[:ship_address] = user&.ship_address
    68	
    69	        @order = Spree::Core::Importer::Order.import(user, order_importer_params)
    70	        redirect_to cart_admin_order_url(@order)
    71	      end
    72	
    73	      def edit
    74	        require_ship_address
    75	      end
    76	
    77	      def cart
    78	        if @order.shipped_shipments.count > 0
    79	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
    80	        end
    81	      end
    82	
    83	      def advance
    84	        if @order.completed?
    85	          flash[:notice] = t("spree.order_already_completed")
    86	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
    87	        else
    88	          @order.contents.advance
    89	
    90	          if @order.can_complete?
    91	            flash[:success] = t("spree.order_ready_for_confirm")
    92	          else
    93	            flash[:error] = @order.errors.full_messages.join(", ")
    94	          end
    95	          redirect_to confirm_admin_order_url(@order)
    96	        end
    97	      end
    98	
    99	      # GET
   100	      def confirm
   101	        if @order.completed?
   102	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
   103	        elsif !@order.can_complete?
   104	          render template: "spree/admin/orders/confirm_advance"
   105	        end
   106	      end
   107	
   108	      # PUT
   109	      def complete
   110	        @order.complete!
   111	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_completed")
   112	        redirect_to edit_admin_order_url(@order)
   113	      rescue StateMachines::InvalidTransition => error
   114	        flash[:error] = error.message
   115	        redirect_to confirm_admin_order_url(@order)
   116	      end
   117	
   118	      def cancel
   119	        @order.canceled_by(spree_current_user)
   120	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_canceled")
   121	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   122	      end
   123	
   124	      def resume
   125	        @order.resume!
   126	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_resumed")
   127	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   128	      end
   129	
   130	      def approve
   131	        @order.contents.approve(user: spree_current_user)
   132	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_approved")
   133	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   134	      end
   135	
   136	      def resend
   137	        Spree::Config.order_mailer_class.confirm_email(@order, true).deliver_later
   138	        flash[:success] = t("spree.order_email_resent")
   139	
   140	        redirect_to(spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order))
   141	      end
   142	
   143	      def unfinalize_adjustments
   144	        adjustments = @order.all_adjustments.finalized
   145	        adjustments.each(&:unfinalize!)
   146	        flash[:success] = t("spree.all_adjustments_unfinalized")
   147	
   148	        respond_with(@order) { |format| format.html { redirect_to(spree.admin_order_adjustments_path(@order)) } }
   149	      end
   150	
   151	      def finalize_adjustments
   152	        adjustments = @order.all_adjustments.not_finalized
   153	        adjustments.each(&:finalize!)
   154	        flash[:success] = t("spree.all_adjustments_finalized")
   155	
   156	        respond_with(@order) { |format| format.html { redirect_to(spree.admin_order_adjustments_path(@order)) } }
   157	      end
   158	
   159	      private
   160	
   161	      def order_params
   162	        {
   163	          created_by_id: spree_current_user.try(:id),
   164	          frontend_viewable: false,
   165	          store_id: current_store.try(:id)
   166	        }.with_indifferent_access
   167	      end
   168	
   169	      def load_order
   170	        @order = Spree::Order.includes(:adjustments).find_by!(number: params[:id])
   171	        authorize! action, @order
   172	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
   173	        resource_not_found(flash_class: Spree::Order, redirect_url: admin_orders_path)
   174	      end
   175	
   176	      # Used for extensions which need to provide their own custom event links on the order details view.
   177	      def initialize_order_events
   178	        @order_events = %w[approve cancel resume]
   179	      end
   180	
   181	      def model_class
   182	        Spree::Order
   183	      end
   184	
   185	      def insufficient_stock_error
   186	        flash[:error] = t("spree.insufficient_stock_for_order")
   187	        redirect_to cart_admin_order_url(@order)
   188	      end
   189	
   190	      def require_ship_address
   191	        if @order.ship_address.nil?

     1	# frozen_string_literal: true
     2	
     3	module Spree
     4	  module Admin
     5	    class PaymentsController < Spree::Admin::BaseController
     6	      rescue_from Spree::Order::InsufficientStock, with: :insufficient_stock_error
     7	
     8	      before_action :load_order, only: [:create, :new, :index, :fire]
     9	      before_action :load_payment, except: [:create, :new, :index, :fire]
    10	      before_action :load_payment_for_fire, only: :fire
    11	      before_action :load_data
    12	      before_action :load_log_entries, only: [:show]
    13	      before_action :require_bill_address, only: [:index]
    14	
    15	      helper ::Spree::Admin::OrdersHelper
    16	
    17	      respond_to :html
    18	
    19	      def index
    20	        @payments = @order.payments.includes(refunds: :reason)
    21	        @refunds = @payments.flat_map(&:refunds)
    22	        redirect_to new_admin_order_payment_url(@order) if @payments.empty?
    23	      end
    24	
    25	      def new
    26	        @payment = @order.payments.build(amount: @order.outstanding_balance)
    27	      end
    28	
    29	      def create
    30	        @payment = PaymentCreate.new(@order, object_params).build
    31	        if @payment.payment_method.source_required? && params[:card].present? && params[:card] != "new"
    32	          @payment.source = @payment.payment_method.payment_source_class.find_by(id: params[:card])
    33	        end
    34	
    35	        begin
    36	          if @payment.save
    37	            if @order.completed?
    38	              # If the order was already complete then go ahead and process the payment
    39	              # (auth and/or capture depending on payment method configuration)
    40	              @payment.process! if @payment.checkout?
    41	            else
    42	              # Transition order as far as it will go.
    43	              while @order.next; end
    44	            end
    45	
    46	            flash[:success] = flash_message_for(@payment, :successfully_created)
    47	            redirect_to admin_order_payments_path(@order)
    48	          else
    49	            flash[:error] = t("spree.payment_could_not_be_created")
    50	            render :new
    51	          end
    52	        rescue Spree::Core::GatewayError => error
    53	          flash[:error] = error.message.to_s
    54	          redirect_to new_admin_order_payment_path(@order)
    55	        end
    56	      end
    57	
    58	      def fire
    59	        return unless (event = params[:e]) && @payment.payment_source
    60	
    61	        # Because we have a transition method also called void, we do this to avoid conflicts.
    62	        event = "void_transaction" if event == "void"
    63	        if @payment.send("#{event}!")
    64	          flash[:success] = t("spree.payment_updated")
    65	        else
    66	          flash[:error] = t("spree.cannot_perform_operation")
    67	        end
    68	      rescue Spree::Core::GatewayError => ge
    69	        flash[:error] = ge.message.to_s
    70	      ensure
    71	        redirect_to admin_order_payments_path(@order)
    72	      end
    73	
    74	      private
    75	
    76	      def object_params
    77	        if params[:payment] && params[:payment_source] && (source_params = params.delete(:payment_source)[params[:payment][:payment_method_id]])
    78	          params[:payment][:source_attributes] = source_params
    79	        end
    80	
    81	        params.require(:payment).permit(permitted_payment_attributes)
    82	      end
    83	
    84	      def load_data
    85	        @amount = params[:amount] || load_order.total
    86	        @payment_methods = Spree::PaymentMethod.active.available_to_admin.ordered_by_position
    87	        @payment_method = if @payment&.payment_method
    88	          @payment.payment_method
    89	        else
    90	          @payment_methods.first
    91	        end
    92	      end
    93	
    94	      def load_order
    95	        @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:order_id])
    96	        authorize! action, @order
    97	        @order
    98	      rescue ActiveRecord::RecordNotFound
    99	        resource_not_found(flash_class: Spree::Order, redirect_url: admin_orders_path)
   100	      end
   101	
   102	      def load_payment
   103	        @payment = Spree::Payment.find(params[:id])
   104	      end
   105	
   106	      def load_log_entries
   107	        @all_log_entries = Spree::LogEntry
   108	          .where(source: @payment)
   109	          .or(Spree::LogEntry.where(source: @payment.refunds))
   110	          .order(:created_at)
   111	      end
   112	
   113	      def load_payment_for_fire
   114	        load_payment
   115	        authorize! params[:e].to_sym, @payment
   116	      end
   117	
   118	      def model_class
   119	        Spree::Payment
   120	      end
   121	
   122	      def require_bill_address
   123	        if Spree::Config[:order_bill_address_used] && @order.bill_address.nil?
   124	          flash[:notice] = t("spree.fill_in_customer_info")
   125	          redirect_to edit_admin_order_customer_url(@order)
   126	        end
   127	      end
   128	
   129	      def insufficient_stock_error
   130	        flash[:error] = t("spree.insufficient_stock_for_order")
   131	        redirect_to new_admin_order_payment_url(@order)
   132	      end
   133	    end
   134	  end
   135	end

     3	module SolidusAdmin
     4	  class OrdersController < SolidusAdmin::BaseController
     5	    include Spree::Core::ControllerHelpers::StrongParameters
     6	    include SolidusAdmin::ControllerHelpers::Search
     7	
     8	    search_scope(:completed, default: true) { _1.complete.order(completed_at: :desc) }
     9	    search_scope(:canceled) { _1.canceled.order(completed_at: :desc) }
    10	    search_scope(:returned) { _1.with_state(:returned).order(completed_at: :desc) }
    11	    search_scope(:in_progress) { _1.with_state([:cart] + _1.checkout_step_names).order(id: :desc) }
    12	    search_scope(:all) { _1.order(id: :desc) }
    13	
    14	    def index
    15	      orders = apply_search_to(
    16	        Spree::Order.includes(:line_items),
    17	        param: :q,
    18	        distinct: false
    19	      )
    20	
    21	      set_page_and_extract_portion_from(orders)
    22	
    23	      respond_to do |format|
    24	        format.html { render component("orders/index").new(page: @page) }
    25	      end
    26	    end
    27	
    28	    def new
    29	      order = Spree::Order.create!(
    30	        created_by: current_solidus_admin_user,
    31	        frontend_viewable: false,
    32	        store_id: current_store.try(:id)
    33	      )
    34	
    35	      redirect_to order_url(order), status: :see_other
    36	    end
    37	
    38	    def show
    39	      load_order
    40	
    41	      respond_to do |format|
    42	        format.html { render component("orders/show").new(order: @order) }
    43	      end
    44	    end
    45	
    46	    def update
    47	      load_order
    48	
    49	      @order.assign_attributes(order_params)
    50	      @order.email ||= @order.user.email if @order.user&.changed?
    51	
    52	      if @order.save
    53	        flash[:notice] = t(".success")
    54	      else
    55	        flash[:error] = t(".error")
    56	      end
    57	
    58	      respond_to do |format|
    59	        format.html { redirect_to spree.edit_admin_order_path(@order) }
    60	
    61	        format.turbo_stream { render turbo_stream: '<turbo-stream action="refresh" />' }
    62	      end
    63	    end
    64	
    65	    def edit
    66	      redirect_to action: :show
    67	    end
    68	
    69	    def variants_for
    70	      load_order
    71	
    72	      # We need to eager load active storage attachments when using it
    73	      if Spree::Image.include?(Spree::Image::ActiveStorageAttachment)
    74	        image_includes = {
    75	          attachment_attachment: {blob: {variant_records: {image_attachment: :blob}}}
    76	        }
    77	      end
    78	
    79	      @variants = Spree::Variant
    80	        .where.not(id: @order.line_items.select(:variant_id))
    81	        .order(created_at: :desc, id: :desc)
    82	        .where(product_id: Spree::Product.ransack(params[:q]).result.select(:id))
    83	        .limit(10)
    84	        .eager_load(
    85	          :prices,
    86	          images: image_includes || {},
    87	          option_values: :option_type,
    88	          stock_items: :stock_location
    89	        )
    90	
    91	      respond_to do |format|
    92	        format.html { render component("orders/cart/result").with_collection(@variants, order: @order), layout: false }
    93	      end
    94	    end
    95	
    96	    def customers_for
    97	      load_order
    98	
    99	      @users = Spree.user_class
   100	        .where.not(id: @order.user_id)
   101	        .order(created_at: :desc, id: :desc)
   102	        .ransack(params[:q])
   103	        .result(distinct: true)
   104	        .includes(:default_user_bill_address, :default_user_ship_address)
   105	        .limit(10)
   106	
   107	      respond_to do |format|
   108	        format.html { render component("orders/show/customer_search/result").with_collection(@users, order: @order), layout: false }
   109	      end
   110	    end
   111	
   112	    private
   113	
   114	    def load_order
   115	      @order = Spree::Order.find_by!(number: params[:id])
   116	      authorize! action_name, @order
   117	    end
   118	
   119	    def order_params
   120	      params.require(:order).permit(:user_id, permitted_order_attributes)
   121	    end
   122	  end
   123	end
